name: scoped_retrieval_eval
description: Small regression eval for document-scoped retrieval. The alpha and beta fixtures share confusing terms so scoped cases verify the document filter and the unscoped case documents global behavior.

cases.question: What calibration window is used for the shared alloy membrane drift check?
cases.notes: Scoped case: beta contains similar retrieval terms but must not be searched.

cases.question: What calibration window is used for the shared alloy membrane drift check?
cases.notes: Scoped case: alpha contains similar retrieval terms but must not be searched.

cases.question: What calibration window is used for the shared alloy membrane drift check?
cases.notes: Unscoped contrast: the same query can retrieve either fixture at rank 1 because both documents intentionally share terms.
